overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player walks along wet streets reflecting colorful holographic advertisements, crosses a busy intersection with futuristic vehicles, and enters a commercial building with a red-carpeted staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit city sidewalk with magazine stand

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, passing a magazine stand on the left

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past on the street to the left

entered.detail: outdoor newsstand with magazines and items displayed
tall buildings covered with glowing holographic advertisements
green metal barrier separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow wet sidewalk in a cyberpunk city at night. A magazine stand sits on the left while neon holographic advertisements illuminate the buildings ahead. Futuristic vehicles pass by on the left as the camera moves forward through the sparse crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with scramble crosswalk

events.description: exits narrow sidewalk into wide open intersection with crosswalk markings
futuristic sports car drives through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the crosswalk and walking across the wide intersection with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person with umbrella walking ahead in the crosswalk

entered.detail: yellow zebra stripes marking the pedestrian crossing area
large pink glowing star-shaped neon sign suspended over the street
high-rise towers with extensive glass facades and digital displays

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection with wet asphalt reflecting neon lights. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk toward a large pink neon star sign hanging overhead. Futuristic vehicles drive through the intersection as pedestrians with umbrellas cross in various directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with storefronts and signage

events.description: completes crossing and enters commercial area with ground-level shops

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk toward a building entrance with a prominent orange sign

entered.detail: large orange neon sign reading 'PRIMA' on the building facade
ground floor entrance with glass doors and illuminated displays
storefronts with various neon signs and advertisements

segments.scene_description: Walking through a commercial district with the PRIMA building's orange neon sign visible on the right. The wet pavement continues to reflect the surrounding neon lights. Various storefronts line the street as the camera approaches a building entrance with a red staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor staircase with neon accent lighting

events.description: enters building and transitions from outdoor street to indoor staircase

agents.ego_description: walking up a red-carpeted staircase with illuminated handrails, moving from street level upward

entered.detail: steep staircase with red carpet flooring and yellow LED strip lighting along the handrail
dark interior walls of the building enclosing the stairwell
large illuminated advertisements on the left wall of the stairwell

segments.scene_description: Entering the PRIMA building and ascending a narrow red-carpeted staircase. The environment shifts from the open neon-lit street to an enclosed interior space with yellow LED handrails and illuminated posters on the walls. The camera continues upward toward a bright exit at the top of the stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a narrow, neon-lit sidewalk into a sprawling, rain-slicked urban intersection. It begins by gliding past a magazine stand and holographic advertisements that cast vibrant glows onto the wet pavement as futuristic vehicles stream by. As the camera moves forward through a sparse crowd, the confined space opens up into a wide crossing where the asphalt becomes a mirror for the surrounding city lights. The scene then expands across a yellow-striped crosswalk, weaving through pedestrians with umbrellas before turning toward a massive, glowing pink neon star hanging overhead.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a vibrant, rain-slicked commercial street into the enclosed interior of a corporate building. It begins by navigating a neon-lit district where the orange glow of the PRIMA sign reflects off the wet pavement and surrounding storefronts. As the camera approaches a building entrance, the open city atmosphere shifts into a confined space. The scene then transitions upward along a narrow staircase draped in red carpet, guided by yellow LED handrails and illuminated wall posters. The movement continues steadily up the stairs, finally heading toward a bright exit at the top of the climb.
